channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Future of AI: Plug and Play Launches Center for Excellence in Downtown San Jose
item.description: Plug and Play launches AI Center for Excellence in downtown San Jose, partnering with the city, PG&E, and San Jose State University to create a hub for AI startups.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump launches new office to oversee CHIPS Act, boost semiconductor investments
item.description: US President Donald J. Trump signed an executive order this week creating the US Investment Accelerator office to oversee the CHIPS and Science Act, a Biden-era program to re-shore semiconductor production.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: UFC signs multimillion-dollar partnership deal with Meta
item.description: UFC signed a multimillion-dollar partnership deal Tuesday with Meta, Facebook's parent company, with the goal of restructuring its fan experience to include artificial intelligence (AI).
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Sony launches two new budget soundbars – one with Dolby Atmos and DTS:X, and one with big surround-sound for cheap
item.description: Sony has announced a trio of home theater audio offerings, led by a new entry-level Dolby Atmos soundbar.
item.dc:creator: al.griffin@futurenet.com (Al Griffin), TechRadar

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 launch date is announced
item.description: Wednesday’s presentation started off with an extended look at “Mario Kart World,” the console’s launch bundle game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 is bringing back one of the Nintendo DS’s best features
item.description: The Nintendo Switch 2's best feature is the ability to play Mario Kart World with all your friends and just one game cartridge.
item.dc:creator: john-anthony.disotto@futurenet.com (John-Anthony Disotto), TechRadar

item.title: Coal-fired power plant, now retired, to become massive gas-powered campus for AI, data centers
item.description: What was once Pennsylvania’s biggest coal-fired power plant is being turned into a $10 billion natural gas-powered data center campus designed to capitalize on Big Tech's fast-growing energy demands.
item.dc:creator: Marc Levy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The strategic move CIOs must take to transform procurement
item.description: Many procurement teams are struggling to optimize spend while effectively managing supplier relationships, mitigating supply chain disruptions, and maintaining compliance. Traditional procurement processes – often manual and siloed – can’t keep up.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Meta is fined by Turkey after refusing to restrict content on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: Facebook and Instagram owner Meta Platforms says it has been hit with a hefty fine for resisting Turkish government demands that it limit content.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Red Hat Updates Developer Hub with Adoption Insights
item.description: Red Hat updates Developer Hub with new features and developer preview of Adoption Insights dashboard
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok, a deal that could potentially stop the social media site from being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte" to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Talent gap complicates cost-conscious cloud planning
item.description: Enterprises know everything is not moving to the cloud – that was the lesson of 2024, and it triggered some extreme reactions that fueled the cloud repatriation stories we all heard. The lesson for 2025? It’s that some things are, and should be, moving to the cloud.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: NASA finds generative AI can’t be trusted
item.description: Although many C-suite and line-of-business (LOB) execs are doing everything they can to focus on generative AI (genAI) efficiency and flexibility — and not about how often the technology delivers wrong answers — IT decision-makers can’t afford to do the same thing.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump says he expects Musk to eventually return to running companies
item.description: President Trump on Monday said he expects Elon Musk will eventually return to running his companies after his work overhauling the federal government. A reporter noted that Musk, the CEO of Tesla and SpaceX, is a special government employee, which means he can only work for 130 days in his role.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Apple’s Swift language gets version manager
item.description: Apple has introduced swiftly 1.0, a version manager for the Swift programming language that is intended to ease the process of installing, managing, and updating the user’s Swift tool chain. Swiftly 1.0 was announced March 28.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas. Dow's subsidiary, Long Mott Energy, applied Monday to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a construction permit.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Microsoft adds data agents to Fabric to help business users with analytics
item.description: Microsoft is adding new data agents to Fabric, its cloud-based offering combining data warehousing, data science, data engineering, and data analytics services. Its goal is to help business users find insights in enterprise data without the help of a business analyst.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Army Lt. Gen. Jeth Rey on achieving data centricity
item.description: By integrating zero trust into a less complex network infrastructure, the military can access data to speed decisions, Army G-6 deputy chief of staff says. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Army Lt. Gen. Jeth Rey on achieving data centricity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
